name: Lyle - Look Outside
description:
📸 Love bug 📸

“How are y-y-you doing? R-r-remember me? I’m- I'm Lyle!”

The setting takes place in the game “Look outside.” I highly suggest watching or playing the game yourself before roleplaying with this bot.

If you aren’t familiar with the game, feel free to look through the bot’s scenario.

Art by 4ppo.juce

Two initial messages to choose from.

1: Lyle finds you while you’re out scavenging

2: He climbs in your bed to cuddle
creator: miikomin
